title: Purely Roasted Mediterranean Lentil Pilaf
description: A light and adventurous Mediterranean dish featuring roasted French lentils, beurre-monte, and fresh herbs, perfect for a healthy and flavorful meal. This raw-friendly recipe is made with wholesome ingredients and is free from heavy sauces and spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the lentils with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the lentils on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they are lightly browned and tender.
While the lentils are roasting, heat the beurre-monte in a small saucepan over low heat until it is melted and warm.
Add the cherry tomatoes, red onion, parsley, and mint to the saucepan with the beurre-monte and stir to combine.
Once the lentils are done roasting, add them to the saucepan with the beurre-monte mixture and stir to combine.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the lentil mixture and stir to combine.
Season the lentil pilaf with additional salt and black pepper to taste, if needed.
Serve the Purely Roasted Mediterranean Lentil Pilaf hot, garnished with additional parsley and mint if desired.
